metadata.title: Casa in Ordine – Decluttering & Home Organizing in Rome
metadata.description: We transform your chaos into a haven of peace. Professional decluttering and home organizing service.

hero.title: Casa in Ordine
hero.subtitle: We combine methodical efficiency with the warmth of a home that truly welcomes.

whatWeDo.title: What We Do
whatWeDo.description: Casa in Ordine is your partner in creating tidy, functional, and harmonious spaces. With a personalized approach, we help you free your spaces from clutter and organize every corner of your home.
whatWeDo.learnMore: Learn more about our decluttering and organizing services

decluttering.title: Decluttering
decluttering.description: Free your spaces from excess and rediscover the joy of living in a light and tidy environment.

organizing.title: Home Organizing
organizing.description: We organize every room in your home with practical and personalized solutions.

consulting.title: Consulting
consulting.description: Personalized sessions to guide you through the process of reorganizing your spaces.

items.text: Casa in Ordine completely transformed my home. I can't believe how much space I had hidden under all that clutter!
items.author: Maria R.

items.text: Professional, kind, and incredibly efficient. My closet has never been this organized. Highly recommended!
items.author: Lucia T.

items.text: Thanks to the consulting service, I learned how to maintain order on my own. An investment worth every penny.
items.author: Francesca M.

beforeAfter.title: We transform your chaos into a haven of peace

reflection.title: Clutter isn't just physical, it's mental.
reflection.description: In Italy, the home is the center of life. But between work, family, and moves, your space can become a source of stress. We don't just sort boxes: we reorganize your habits to give you more time for what you love.
reflection.benefit1Desc: Less time searching, more time living
reflection.benefit2Desc: An organized space, a peaceful mind
reflection.chartCaption: Visualization of mental balance after our intervention.

services.title: How can we help you?
services.subtitle: Once we understand your need, we define the area of intervention.

whyUs.title: Why choose Us.
whyUs.description: We come from a culture where hospitality is sacred. In Italy we found our home, but we carry a secret: order doesn't have to be cold or rigid. It must be alive.
whyUs.point1Desc: We listen without ever judging the state of your home.
whyUs.point2Desc: We find space where you thought there was none.
whyUs.point3Desc: Every reorganization ends with a special touch for your senses.
whyUs.quote: Order is the foundation of joy, and joy is the soul of the home.

finalCta.title:
Ready to live
in a home in order?
finalCta.description: Book your free 15-minute introductory consultation today. Let's start designing your new space together.

about.title: About Us – Casa in Ordine | Professional Decluttering & Home Organizing
about.metaDescription: Meet Dalia and Surinay, founders of Casa in Ordine: professional decluttering, home reorganization and organizing service in Italy. Custom solutions for closets, kitchens, offices and every room.
about.heroSubtitle: Two friends, two paths, one vision.
about.intro: We are Dalia and Surinay, two Cuban friends who arrived in Italy with a suitcase full of dreams, experiences, and different talents. One with the soul of dance, the other with the mind of economics: two seemingly distant worlds that, meeting each other, gave life to Casa in Ordine. Because we believe every space, just like a choreography or a well-built balance sheet, needs harmony and strategy to truly work.

story.title: How Casa in Ordine was born
story.p1: The idea was born during a dinner between friends, talking about projects and dreams. Dalia shared a dream she had been keeping for a long time: turning her natural passion for organization into something real for people.
story.p2: Surinay, captivated by that enthusiasm, immediately started imagining how to shape that dream — and from that evening, we never stopped.
story.p3: So, from the meeting between the discipline of the stage and the precision of numbers, our promise was born: to bring order, lightness, and beauty into people's homes.

offer.title: What we offer you
offer.description: At Casa in Ordine, we don't just put things away: we study your habits, listen to your needs, and design custom systems that combine aesthetics and functionality. Every drawer becomes a small work of art, every room a gear that works for you.
offer.highlight: The added value? We give you back time, serenity, and that feeling of breathing that comes from entering a space that truly feels like you.

goal.title: Our goal
goal.description: We want Casa in Ordine to become a reference point in Italy for those seeking a new way to experience their home — not as a place to manage, but as a refuge to inhabit.
goal.motto: Because for us, order is not a luxury: it's a form of daily well-being. We bring your spaces to life.

values.title: Harmony
values.description: Every space deserves balance between aesthetics and functionality, like a well-crafted choreography.

values.title: Empathy
values.description: We listen without judging. Your home is your world, and we respect it.

values.title: Tailor-Made
values.description: No pre-packaged solutions: every organizing project is born from your real needs.

steps.title: Listen
steps.description: We understand your habits and assess the spaces to reorganize.

steps.title: Design
steps.description: We create a personalized decluttering and organizing plan.

steps.title: Transform
steps.description: We reorganize every room with practical, beautiful solutions.

steps.title: Maintain
steps.description: We teach you to keep things in order with simple routines.

services.title: Our Services
services.metaDescription: Discover the professional decluttering, home organizing, and consulting services offered by Casa in Ordine in Rome.

items.title: Decluttering
items.description: Decluttering is the first step toward an organized home. We help you free your spaces from items you no longer use, creating a lighter and more breathable environment.
features: Emotional support during the separation process
Visible results in just a few hours

items.title: Home Organizing
items.description: We organize every room in your home with practical and functional systems. From the kitchen to the closet, we create solutions that simplify daily life.

items.title: Personalized Consulting
items.description: Individual consulting sessions to guide you through the reorganization process. You'll learn techniques and strategies to maintain order independently.

items.title: Maintenance
items.description: An ongoing service to maintain the order achieved. Periodic visits to check the organizational system and make any improvements.
